text:
is a Zailiner for enhancing the arms of a Shinkalion Z unit. It appears in episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z TV animation series. It can combination with Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA to form Shinkalion Z 500 μSky TYPE EVA.

Profile

The exterior design of the Zailiner μSky TYPE EVA is based on the Meitetsu 2000 Series train in its Evangelion wrapping livery. Its overall Weapon Mode structure is identical to that of Zailiner 323 Osaka Kanjyo's, with the main frame forming a pair of asymmetrical limbs while its facade, chassis as well as a major portion of the roof forming the μSky Shield.

Development

A transformable toy was made by Takara Tomy, under the line Plarail Z Combine: Plarail Shinkalion Z 500 μSky TYPE EVA on 18 December 2021 and re-released on November 2022 for ¥9,350 (tax included). https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gI1001002/
